info.title: EMQX API
info.description: EMQX open-source MQTT broker REST API (v5). Provides management endpoints for clients, subscriptions, topics, publishing, rules, bridges, authentication, authorization, listeners, nodes, stats, metrics, and configuration. All API paths start with /api/v5.
